name: What if I have pre-existing bad reviews and now low AI rankings? Can I still sue?
description: Harder; prove AI caused additional specific harm.[1][3]

mainEntity.name: What if I have pre-existing bad reviews and now low AI rankings? Can I still sue?

acceptedAnswer.text: Harder; prove AI caused additional specific harm.[1][3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Pre-existing issues weaken claims by showing alternative causation for low visibility.[1] Must isolate AI impact.[3] Key factors: timeline evidence, comparative analytics.[1] Segregate data showing AI-specific drop, expert differentiate factors.[1] Tougher case; focus on provable harm.
